description: Model a 'US Electricity Grid Mix 2035' scenario in openLCA using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and TRACI 2.1 methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Create a process named 'US Electricity Grid Mix 2035' producing 1 kWh (3.6 MJ) of electricity with an input mix of 40% Wind (Onshore), 30% Solar (PV), 20% Nuclear, and 10% Natural Gas from the USLCI database. Calculate the Global Warming Potential (GWP) using TRACI 2.1 for the resulting product system. Export the LCIA results to '~/LCA_Results/grid_2035_results.csv' and document the exact names of the four USLCI processes used in a text file at '~/LCA_Results/mix_composition.txt'.
